title: Home | International Conference on Recent Trends in Biotechnology and BioInformatics ICBAB - 19
content: Home | International Conference on Recent Trends in Biotechnology and BioInformatics ICBAB - 19 Home About Registration Contact International Conference on Recent Trends in Biotechnology and BioInformatics ICBAB - 2019 August 01 - 03, 2019 Interactive Lectures & Oral and Poster Sessions On Biotechnology, Bioinformatics and Their Applications Home About Registration Contact Click Here for ICBAB Highlights and Recommendations Click Here for Poster Sessions Schedule Click Here for Detailed Program : ICBAB-2019 Click Here for Participant's Details : ICBAB-2019 Conference Themes and Topics BIOTECHNOLOGY Extremozymes and Industrial Biotechnology Medical & Microbial Biotechnology Plant & Animal Biotechnology Environmental Biotechnology Nano Biotechnology Food Biotechnology Biodiversity and Biostatistics Other Relevant Areas BIOINFORMATICS Biological Sequence Analysis Genomics and Proteomics Data Mining and Machine Learning Structural Bioinformatics Computer Aided Drug Design NGS Data Analysis Systems and Synthetic Biology Biomedical Informatics Other Relevant Areas About the Conference ICBAB-2019 aims to bring and exchange the ideas and knowledge of academia and industry. The conference mainly focuses on Recent Trends in  Biotechnology and Bioinformatics and to strengthen their applications in various domains of life sciences. Speakers Dr. R.K. Sani - South Dakota, USA Dr. Bishwajit Kundu - IIT Delhi, New Delhi, India Dr. S.S. Kanwar - HPU, Shimla, H.P., India Dr. Debasis Dash - IGIB, New Delhi, India Dr. Prashanth N Suravajhala - Birla Institute of Scientific Research, Rajasthan, India How to apply?
